visa_types.name: Medical Treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bhr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Please check the list of requisite documents before submitting your application. This will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
 Hungary Checklist 
Questionnaire- Non- Bahraini Applicants
visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]

Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in BHD) BHD 15.5 for Countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union,
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Economic Area, notwithstanding their nationality are exempt from the fee (Children - under the age of 18/Spouse of EU Citizen/Parents of children - under the age of 18 - if the child is an EEA citizen)
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
Holders of diplomatic and special passports
- Bearers of Diplomatic and Special Passports are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for assessment of a Schengen Visa depends on the applicant's nationality and may take up to 15 calendar days after the application is registered with the Embassy of
                                                                        Hungary in Riyadh. Applications should be made as early as possible (within 6 months ahead of departure).
- Please Note:
The processing time is an indication only. Applicants can always be requested by the Embassy to appear for an interview. The Embassy reserves the right
                                                                            to ask for further documentation.
Please note if you are applying for a visa to Hungary from Bahrain, it will take an additional of 3-4 days apart from the standard processing time.
visa_types.forms:
Please take a printout of the Visa application Form. You are required to fill in all details of the applicant in a legible handwriting and submit it along with the required documents
                                                                        to the Visa Application Center.
Application for Schengen Visa
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen  information
Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Visa  for the purpose of Medical Treatment
Applicable for solely medical treatments in Hungary not longer than 90 days. In case of wellness programs tourism purpose should be declared.
The accompanying persons have to apply for a tourist visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen  information
Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Visa  for the purpose of Medical Treatment
Applicable for solely medical treatments in Hungary not longer than 90 days. In case of wellness programs tourism purpose should be declared.
The accompanying persons have to apply for a tourist visa.

## Visa Fees

[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]

Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in BHD) BHD 15.5 for Countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union,
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Economic Area, notwithstanding their nationality are exempt from the fee (Children - under the age of 18/Spouse of EU Citizen/Parents of children - under the age of 18 - if the child is an EEA citizen)
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
Holders of diplomatic and special passports
- Bearers of Diplomatic and Special Passports are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bhr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Please check the list of requisite documents before submitting your application. This will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
 Hungary Checklist 
Questionnaire- Non- Bahraini Applicants

## Photo Specifications
- colored photo taken against a white background
- not older than 6 months
- full-face
- face-cover is not permitted for Ladies, head cover is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not
                                                                            cast any shadow over the face
- head cover is not permitted for Gentleman
- glasses are not permitted
- image must not have been altered
- image must be sharp, clear and good quality
The photograph for visa must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photo.

## Processing Time
The processing time for assessment of a Schengen Visa depends on the applicant's nationality and may take up to 15 calendar days after the application is registered with the Embassy of
                                                                        Hungary in Riyadh. Applications should be made as early as possible (within 6 months ahead of departure).
- Please Note:
The processing time is an indication only. Applicants can always be requested by the Embassy to appear for an interview. The Embassy reserves the right
                                                                            to ask for further documentation.
Please note if you are applying for a visa to Hungary from Bahrain, it will take an additional of 3-4 days apart from the standard processing time.

## Download Forms
 Please take a printout of the Visa application Form. You are required to fill in all details of the applicant in a legible handwriting and submit it along with the required documents
                                                                        to the Visa Application Center.
Application for Schengen Visa

visa_types.visa_fees:
[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in BHD) BHD 15.5 for Countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union,
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service charge, and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
visa_types.processing_time:
- Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 5 working days for GCC passport holders and other nationalities (eg. India, Philippines) (Subject to change without
                                                                            prior notice).
- Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within 10-21 days.
- The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; the period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual
                                                                            cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.
- Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Please note if you are applying for a visa to Hungary from Bahrain, it will take an additional of 3-4 days apart from the standard processing time.
visa_types.forms:
Please take a printout of the Visa application Form. You are required to fill in all details of the applicant in a legible handwriting and submit it along with the required documents
                                                                        to the Visa Application Center.
Application for Schengen Visa
visa_types.overview:
Overview
- This visa is intended for household helpers (house keeper/nanny/houseboy) who are travelling with local sponsor who either own a property in Hungary or has a rented apartment that
                                                                            does not provide in-house housekeeping services; and are travelling with children/medical patient/elderly/child with special needs. This visa does not allow the visa holder to
                                                                            work in Hungary apart from the purpose stated at the time of application.
- Only legal residents of Bahrain who had completed 1 year with the same sponsor can apply for a visa at the Application Center in Manama. Applicant must have a valid Bahrain residency
                                                                            that covers the entire duration of the trip (‘til the date of return).
- The Embassy reserves the right to call on applicants for interview if further details or documents are required.
- Visa applicants must submit their application in person and enroll their biometric (fingerprints) at the time of submission.
- Only applicants travelling within the next 3 months (90 days) can submit their application
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted; and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the Embassy (see List of
                                                                            required documents).
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid only in cash at the time of submission.
Once received by the Visa Application Centre, applications will be sent to the Embassy of Hungary in Saudi Arabia the next working day & the applicant will be given an appointment
                                                                                for a personal Interview (if needed) with the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh. Once the assessment is completed by the Embassy, the decision together with the passport & the
                                                                                other relevant documents will be available for collection from the Visa Application Centre.
Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen States. Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of third countries that are legal residents in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the Hungary
                                                                                Visa Application Centre in Manama. Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid only in cash at the time of application
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
Applicant’s lack of Travel plan will not fall on Embassy priority to process your visa. It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- This visa is intended for household helpers (house keeper/nanny/houseboy) who are travelling with local sponsor who either own a property in Hungary or has a rented apartment that
                                                                            does not provide in-house housekeeping services; and are travelling with children/medical patient/elderly/child with special needs. This visa does not allow the visa holder to
                                                                            work in Hungary apart from the purpose stated at the time of application.
- Only legal residents of Bahrain who had completed 1 year with the same sponsor can apply for a visa at the Application Center in Manama. Applicant must have a valid Bahrain residency
                                                                            that covers the entire duration of the trip (‘til the date of return).
- The Embassy reserves the right to call on applicants for interview if further details or documents are required.
- Visa applicants must submit their application in person and enroll their biometric (fingerprints) at the time of submission.
- Only applicants travelling within the next 3 months (90 days) can submit their application
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted; and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the Embassy (see List of
                                                                            required documents).
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid only in cash at the time of submission.
Once received by the Visa Application Centre, applications will be sent to the Embassy of Hungary in Saudi Arabia the next working day & the applicant will be given an appointment
                                                                                for a personal Interview (if needed) with the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh. Once the assessment is completed by the Embassy, the decision together with the passport & the
                                                                                other relevant documents will be available for collection from the Visa Application Centre.
Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen States. Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of third countries that are legal residents in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the Hungary
                                                                                Visa Application Centre in Manama. Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid only in cash at the time of application
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
Applicant’s lack of Travel plan will not fall on Embassy priority to process your visa. It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience

## Visa Fees

[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in BHD) BHD 15.5 for Countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union,
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service charge, and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bhr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Please check the list of requisite documents before submitting your application. This will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
 Hungary Checklist 
Questionnaire- Non- Bahraini Applicants

## Photo Specifications
- colored photo taken against a white background
- not older than 6 months
- full-face
- face-cover is not permitted for Ladies, head cover is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not
                                                                            cast any shadow over the face
- head cover is not permitted for Gentleman
- glasses are not permitted
- image must not have been altered
- image must be sharp, clear and good quality
The photograph for visa must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photo.

## Processing Time
- Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 5 working days for GCC passport holders and other nationalities (eg. India, Philippines) (Subject to change without
                                                                            prior notice).
- Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within 10-21 days.
- The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; the period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual
                                                                            cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.
- Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Please note if you are applying for a visa to Hungary from Bahrain, it will take an additional of 3-4 days apart from the standard processing time.

## Download Forms
 Please take a printout of the Visa application Form. You are required to fill in all details of the applicant in a legible handwriting and submit it along with the required documents
                                                                        to the Visa Application Center.
Application for Schengen Visa

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen  information
Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Tourist  Visa
Applicable for solely tourism purposes. If tourism is joined with another purpose such as a business meeting, private visit or visit of relatives, etc., such other purpose should be declared
                                                                        as the main one.
Family members of the EEA Member States traveling together with or to the family member of an EEA Member States are exempt from the visa fee and submission of part of supporting documents enlisted on the checklists to be downloaded for the application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen  information
Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Tourist  Visa
Applicable for solely tourism purposes. If tourism is joined with another purpose such as a business meeting, private visit or visit of relatives, etc., such other purpose should be declared
                                                                        as the main one.
Family members of the EEA Member States traveling together with or to the family member of an EEA Member States are exempt from the visa fee and submission of part of supporting documents enlisted on the checklists to be downloaded for the application.

## Visa Fees

[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]

Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.

- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
Holders of diplomatic and special passports

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bhr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Please check the list of requisite documents before submitting your application. This will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents

- colored photo taken against a white background
- not older than 6 months
- full-face
- face-cover is not permitted for Ladies, head cover is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not
                                                                            cast any shadow over the face

Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Visa  for the visit friends or family, or attending at a sport event
In case of staying with friends or family member in Hungary, the applicant has to submit an invitation letter with an attached copy of the Hungarian residence permit of the friend or family member justifying the purpose of the visit.
The travelers with the purpose of sport activity have to submit an invitation letter or the acceptance letter of the Hungarian Sport Club or Sport Facility, or a proof about the registration
                                                                        at the sport event.
Family members of the EEA Member States traveling together with or to the family member of an EEA Member States for the purpose of visit are exempt from the visa fee and submission of
                                                                        part of supporting documents enlisted on the checklists to be downloaded for the application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen  information
Schengen States issue uniform visas for short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period. The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry (as a rule for the 1st time visitors
                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
If your travel destination is only Hungary, the Hungarian Embassy in Riyadh will deal with your application. If your travel destination includes more than one Schengen Member State, your
                                                                        application must be dealt by the Embassy/Consulate of your main destination
The following criteria may help you to decide whether you should submit your visa application with the Hungarian Visa Application Centre.
- Hungary is the sole destination of your visit(s);
- Your visit to Schengen States includes more than one destination and Hungary is the main destination of the visit(s) in terms of the length or purpose of stay;
- If you cannot determine which is your main destination, but Hungary is the first Schengen State you wish to enter.
Please note that the Embassy of Hungary in Riyadh issues visas only for residents in its territory of responsibility – Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Kingdom of Bahrain, Sultanate of Oman and
                                                                        Republic of Yemen.
Visa  for the visit friends or family, or attending at a sport event
In case of staying with friends or family member in Hungary, the applicant has to submit an invitation letter with an attached copy of the Hungarian residence permit of the friend or family member justifying the purpose of the visit.
The travelers with the purpose of sport activity have to submit an invitation letter or the acceptance letter of the Hungarian Sport Club or Sport Facility, or a proof about the registration
                                                                        at the sport event.
Family members of the EEA Member States traveling together with or to the family member of an EEA Member States for the purpose of visit are exempt from the visa fee and submission of
                                                                        part of supporting documents enlisted on the checklists to be downloaded for the application.

## Visa Fees

[hun > bhr > en > Table:Tourism/other Private Visits > Visa Fees 1]

Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 12.32 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) and Mandatory two-way courier fee of BHD 4.4 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in BHD) BHD 15.5 for Countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union,
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Economic Area, notwithstanding their nationality are exempt from the fee (Children - under the age of 18/Spouse of EU Citizen/Parents of children - under the age of 18 - if the child is an EEA citizen)
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
Holders of diplomatic and special passports
- Bearers of Diplomatic and Special Passports are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bhr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Please check the list of requisite documents before submitting your application. This will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
 Hungary Checklist 
Questionnaire- Non- Bahraini Applicants

## Photo Specifications
- colored photo taken against a white background
- not older than 6 months
- full-face
- face-cover is not permitted for Ladies, head cover is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not
                                                                            cast any shadow over the face
- head cover is not permitted for Gentleman
- glasses are not permitted
- image must not have been altered
- image must be sharp, clear and good quality
The photograph for visa must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photo.

## Processing Time
The processing time for assessment of a Schengen Visa depends on the applicant's nationality and may take up to 15 calendar days after the application is registered with the Embassy of
                                                                        Hungary in Riyadh. Applications should be made as early as possible (within 6 months ahead of departure).
- Please Note:
The processing time is an indication only. Applicants can always be requested by the Embassy to appear for an interview. The Embassy reserves the right
                                                                            to ask for further documentation.
Please note if you are applying for a visa to Hungary from Bahrain, it will take an additional of 3-4 days apart from the standard processing time.

## Download Forms
 Please take a printout of the Visa application Form. You are required to fill in all details of the applicant in a legible handwriting and submit it along with the required documents
                                                                        to the Visa Application Center.
Application for Schengen Visa

                                                                        of the Schengen area), for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently as well as proves his/her
                                                                        integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24).
